data_description.chemistry_noise_psk: Leave empty if the ESPHome node does not use API encryption
data_description.pressure_noise_psk: Leave empty if the ESPHome node does not use API encryption
data_description.level_noise_psk: Leave empty if the ESPHome node does not use API encryption

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to one or more ESPHome nodes
error.hosts_must_be_unique: Each node host must be unique

abort.already_configured: This pool integration is already configured

data.fill_running_binary_sensor_object_id: ESPHome fill running binary sensor object_id
data.max_ppm_increase_per_dose: Max free chlorine increase per dose (ppm)
data.chlorine_running_binary_sensor: ESPHome chlorine running binary sensor object_id
data.acid_running_binary_sensor: ESPHome acid running binary sensor object_id

data_description.scan_interval: How often all three ESPHome nodes are polled for new values
data_description.max_dose_ml: Hard upper limit regardless of chemistry caps
data_description.cooldown_seconds: Minimum time that must pass before the same chemical can be dosed again
data_description.orp_hysteresis_mv: Dose is triggered when ORP drops below target minus this value
data_description.orp_sensor_object_id: Must match the object_id of the ORP sensor in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.level_hysteresis_percent: Fill starts when level is below target minus this value
data_description.level_sensor_object_id: Must match the object_id of the water-level sensor in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.fill_start_button_object_id: Must match the object_id of the fill-start button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.fill_stop_button_object_id: Must match the object_id of the fill-stop button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.fill_running_binary_sensor_object_id: Optional. Must match the object_id of a binary sensor that confirms the fill valve state
data_description.max_fill_runtime_minutes: Safety timeout: fill valve is force-closed when exceeded
data_description.chlorine_strength_percent: Available chlorine concentration of your product, used to compute the pool-size dose cap
data_description.max_ppm_increase_per_dose: Maximum allowed rise in free chlorine from a single dose
data_description.acid_strength_percent: Concentration of your acid product, used to compute the pool-size dose cap
data_description.max_ph_drop_per_dose: Maximum allowed pH decrease from a single dose
data_description.total_alkalinity_ppm: Influences how much acid is needed to change pH
data_description.notify_service: Full HA service name, e.g. notify.mobile_app_myphone. Leave empty to use only the persistent notification panel
data_description.ph_sensor_object_id: Must match the object_id of the pH sensor in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.notification_cooldown_minutes: Prevents repeated notifications for the same active condition
data_description.chlorine_volume_number: Must match the object_id of the chlorine volume number in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.acid_volume_number: Must match the object_id of the acid volume number in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.chlorine_dose_button: Must match the object_id of the chlorine dose button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.acid_dose_button: Must match the object_id of the acid dose button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.chlorine_stop_button: Must match the object_id of the chlorine stop button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.acid_stop_button: Must match the object_id of the acid stop button in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.chlorine_running_binary_sensor: Must match the object_id of the chlorine pump running binary sensor in your ESPHome YAML
data_description.acid_running_binary_sensor: Must match the object_id of the acid pump running binary sensor in your ESPHome YAML
